title: Blueberry Almond
subtitle: Freezer Smoothie Pack
description: A mellow, low-GI smoothie built around blueberries and almond butter — high in healthy fats and fiber, with protein from cottage cheese and Greek yogurt.

steps.title: Prep the bag
steps.text: Add all bag contents to a zip-lock or reusable freezer bag:
steps.note: Seal and freeze. These keep for up to 3 months.

steps.title: Blend
steps.text: Add the frozen bag contents to a blender, then add:
bullets: ¼ cup plain full-fat Greek yogurt
steps.note: Blend on high for 45–60 seconds until completely smooth. The chia and hemp seeds add body — it'll be thicker than it looks.

notes.title: Low GI
notes.body: Blueberries have one of the lowest glycemic indexes of any fruit. Combined with the fat and fiber here, this is one of the steadiest blood sugar options in the rotation.

notes.title: Almond butter
notes.body: Add it at blend time, not in the bag — it doesn't freeze well and can clump. One tablespoon is enough; it punches above its weight on flavor and fat.

notes.title: Fiber
notes.body: 9g fiber is the highest in the smoothie lineup. The chia seeds, hemp seeds, and blueberries all contribute — keeps you full well past breakfast.

notes.title: Freezer Prep
notes.body: Make a week's worth of bags at once. Hemp and chia go in the bag dry.
